author: Samy Elkinani
description: Open a simple home page with file-name search, recent notes, deleted-note restore, and vault navigation. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Samy Elkinani
manifest.description: Open a simple home page with file-name search, recent notes, deleted-note restore, and vault navigation.
manifest.name: Simple Home Page

name: Simple Home Page

releases.author: samyelkina
releases.description:
Initial public release of Simple Home for Obsidian

Features:
- file-name search
- recent notes
- deleted-note restore from a local bin
- quick vault tree navigation
- reopen shortcuts for recently closed notes
